description: APS delegation artifact — a signed Ed25519 delegation from a principal to an AgentID-identified agent. Scope-gated, spend-capped, time-bounded. This is the standalone artifact referenced by the scenario fixtures in fixtures/aps/v1/ and by APS receipts that cite this delegation's id.

verification.note: Signature is over the JCS-canonicalized delegation payload minus the signature field itself. Independently verifiable with any Ed25519 library against delegatedBy public key.

interop_notes.audit_chain_position: This delegation is the authorization step. AgentID answers 'who is this agent'; this delegation answers 'what may this agent do'. A governance receipt (see receipt.json in this directory) references this delegationId to complete the audit chain.
interop_notes.scope_interpretation: Scope strings are namespaced verbs. 'data:read' permits reading data sources; 'api:get' permits HTTP GET calls. Non-matching actions deny.
interop_notes.spendLimit_semantics: Cumulative spend ceiling in USD. Actions that would push spentAmount above spendLimit are denied regardless of scope match.
interop_notes.maxDepth: Maximum sub-delegation depth. maxDepth=1 means this delegation can sub-delegate once (to depth 1); beyond that, any further sub-delegation denies.
